name: Ministry of Tourism and International Transport
shortDescription: Sustainable tourism development and oversight of civil aviation and ports.
intro: To make Barbados the number one Caribbean destination through sustainable tourism development.

minister.name: The Hon. G. P. Ian Gooding-Edghill, J.P., M.P.
minister.role: Minister of Tourism and International Transport

onlineServices.title: Visitor permit application
onlineServices.description: Apply to extend your stay in Barbados.

onlineServices.title: Ports of entry
onlineServices.description: Information on Barbados ports of entry.

children.text: The mission of the Division of International Transport is to create an environment that provides a high degree of safety and economic viability in respect of the operations of the civil aviation and maritime sectors, strategically using these sectors as major vehicles for the expansion and further social and economic development of Barbados.

bodyText:
The mission of the Division of International Transport is to create an environment that provides a high degree of safety and economic viability in respect of the operations of the civil aviation and maritime sectors, strategically using these sectors as major vehicles for the expansion and further social and economic development of Barbados.
